name: HR Master Orchestrator Agent
description: Master orchestrator agent that intelligently routes HR requests to specialized worker agents. Manages HR Helpdesk (employee queries), Onboarding (new hires), Resume Shortlisting (recruitment), and Attendance Automation agents.

skills.name: Intelligent Request Routing
skills.description: Analyzes incoming HR requests and routes them to the most appropriate specialized worker agent.

skills.name: HR Helpdesk Routing
skills.description: Routes employee queries about policies, FAQs, issue escalations, and ticket status to the HR Helpdesk Agent.

skills.name: Onboarding Routing
skills.description: Routes new employee onboarding requests to the Onboarding Agent for HR administrators.

skills.name: Resume Shortlisting Routing
skills.description: Routes candidate screening and resume analysis requests to the Resume Shortlisting Agent.

skills.name: Attendance Routing
skills.description: Routes attendance tracking, time-off, and leave management requests to the Attendance Automation Agent.

skills.name: Agent Health Monitoring
skills.description: Checks the health and availability status of worker agents.
